roles.core: central bot, finance, licenses, PasarGuard owner integration, central Plisio invoices and callbacks, central APIs and D1 authority
roles.edge: web panels, reseller bots, customer miniapps, reseller Plisio invoices and callbacks, and latency-sensitive request handling
roles.processor: reports, retry queue, backups and background jobs

features: update compatibility baseline from PasarGuard 5.0.3 to PasarGuard 5.1.0
support the new PasarGuard pg_key_ API keys through the existing access-token setting
send PasarGuard API keys with X-Api-Key while preserving Bearer access-token and username/password fallback modes
keep admin creation, role assignment, user creation, user update, usage sync and revoke-subscription endpoints compatible
show the detected PasarGuard authentication mode in control diagnostics
improve authentication errors for invalid API keys, insufficient API-key permissions and expired legacy access tokens
add the API-key field to first-run setup and clarify it in the advanced management panel
keep Plisio, BluePal, card-to-card and wallet flows unchanged

validation.javascript_syntax: passed for core, edge and processor
validation.pasarguard_v51_auth_header_model: passed: pg_key_ uses X-Api-Key; legacy token and password sessions use Bearer
validation.pasarguard_endpoint_compatibility_review: admin and user endpoints reviewed against upstream v5.1.0
validation.live_pasarguard_v51_call: not run; no live panel credentials were supplied
validation.setup_and_admin_ui: passed: optional API key is accepted and secret fields remain masked
